summary: Frontend-only regression for TournamentOS prototype. Tested landing, theme toggle, login + role-based redirects, register wizard validation, admin queue (tabs/search/club-filter/bulk actions/confirm modal), reviewer workbench (approve/reject/correction drawer with timeline append), club dashboard, applicant dashboard, appeals (grant/deny toasts), reports (csv/pdf export toasts), sidebar role switcher, and mobile breakpoint. All critical data-testids present and wired. No console errors observed on any route.

integration_issues.issue: Sakura Gym demo club (c1) has ZERO needs_correction fighters in the seeded FIGHTERS array, so the Correction Inbox on /club is empty for the demo club account. The correction-card-<id> / resubmit-<id> path therefore cannot be exercised by the default club demo login. Workaround: log in as admin, request a correction on a Sakura Gym fighter, then switch to club. Recommend: seed at least one FIGHTERS row with clubId='c1' and status='needs_correction' in /app/frontend/src/lib/mockData.js so the demo club inbox is populated by default.

issues: ThemeContext toggles the 'dark' class on <html> only, not on document.body. Tailwind dark-mode (class strategy) works correctly on html, so visually everything switches. Review request text specifies 'Body class dark toggles'; if a test literally asserts document.body.classList.contains('dark') it will fail. Low-priority cosmetic spec mismatch — behavior is correct.

MobileTopbar component is rendered at <=md breakpoint but has no data-testid='mobile-topbar'. The spec mentions 'MobileTopbar visible' as a testable item. Add data-testid='mobile-topbar' to the mobile topbar container for testability.

action_items: Seed at least one FIGHTERS row with clubId='c1' (Sakura Gym) and status='needs_correction' so the default /club demo inbox is populated.
Add data-testid='mobile-topbar' to the MobileTopbar container in /app/frontend/src/components/layout/AppShell.jsx for explicit mobile-breakpoint testability.
Optional: mirror the 'dark' class toggle onto document.body in ThemeContext.jsx to match the literal spec wording ('body class dark toggles').
critical_code_review_comments: ThemeContext persists theme in localStorage key 'tos-theme' and toggles html.dark — correct Tailwind pattern but diverges from spec wording that says body class.

AdminQueue bulk approve confirmation modal does not expose role='dialog' (or it was not detected). The Confirm button works and closes the modal, but screen-reader/a11y dialog role should be verified.
Correction drawer submits and appends timeline entry with the typed reason — good UX; drawer closes after submit and toast fires.
No backend; all data is client-side mock. REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is used only as preview URL base — correct per scope.
No console errors or React warnings observed on Landing, Login, Register, Admin Queue, Reviewer Workbench, Club, Applicant, Appeals, Reports, or Mobile Admin Queue.

success_rate.frontend: ~97% (core flows fully green; 2 minor polish items)

test_credentials: Mock auth — any password. Admin mei@tournamentos.io / Reviewer luca@tournamentos.io / Club ops@sakuragym.jp / Applicant diego.ruiz@mail.com (see /app/memory/test_credentials.md).
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing mockData.js FIGHTERS / APPEALS / CLUBS seed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All data-testids in the original spec are present and functional: theme-toggle, role-admin/reviewer/club/applicant, login-submit, step-indicator-1..4, step-next, step-submit, tab-all/submitted/approved/rejected/inbox/roster, queue-search, filter-club, select-all, select-f-<id>, bulk-action-bar, bulk-approve-btn, bulk-correction-btn, queue-row-<id>, workbench-row-<id>, action-approve, action-reject, action-correction, correction-drawer, correction-reason, correction-card-<id>, resubmit-<id>, appeal-row-<id>, appeal-verdict, appeal-grant, appeal-deny, report-export-csv, report-export-pdf, user-menu-trigger, switch-role-<role>. Only missing testid is 'mobile-topbar'. Login redirects verified: admin→/admin/queue, reviewer→/admin/queue, club→/club, applicant→/applicant. Bulk-approve confirm modal uses text 'Confirm' button. Appeals and Reports fire sonner toasts.
